title: Run post-S008 final deliverability gate
goal: Rerun the final deliverability gate after S007/S008 close the source-backed backlog, then give the direct deliverable/not-deliverable judgment with concrete residual risks.
forbidden_scope: No claiming readiness from build/type-check alone.
No source edits unless final verification proves a defect.
acceptance: All source-backed backlog is done or explicitly external.
API/CLI/Web prerequisite gates are represented by current logs after the final source changes.
Runtime/product gates are represented by focused API/CLI logs.
Final review gives a direct deliverable/not-deliverable judgment and dated residual risks.
Docs and board sync are completed.
verification_commands: Final JSON/event parsing, Prettier, and diff hygiene checks.
